filtered_samples.title: CGO IceKredit, Kong Chinang, bergabung dalam GrabX & AI Forward Summit di Jakarta, Mendorong Kolaborasi Tripartit untuk AI yang Bertanggung Jawab di ASEAN
Kong Chinang ประธานเจ้าหน้าที่ฝ่ายการเติบโตของ IceKredit เข้าร่วมงาน GrabX & AI Forward Summit ในจาการ์ตา พร้อมสนับสนุนความร่วมมือไตรภาคีเพื่อ AI ที่มีความรับผิดชอบในอาเซียน
Giám đốc Tăng trưởng (CGO) Kong Chinang của IceKredit tham gia Hội nghị thượng đỉnh GrabX & AI Forward ở Jakarta, kêu gọi hợp tác ba bên để đảm bảo phát triển AI có trách nhiệm ở ASEAN
Ketua Pegawai Pertumbuhan IceKredit, Kong Chinang, Menyertai Sidang Kemuncak GrabX & AI Forward di Jakarta, Menyeru Kerjasama Triparti Demi Penerapan AI Bertanggungjawab di ASEAN
ROSEN, A RANKED AND LEADING LAW FIRM, Encourages Regencell Bioscience Holdings Limited Investors to Secure Counsel Before Important Deadline in Securities Class Action – RGC
REGENCELL ALERT: Bragar Eagel & Squire, P.C. Announces that a Class Action Lawsuit Has Been Filed Against Regencell Bioscience Holdings Limited and Encourages Investors to Contact the Firm
ROSEN, LEADING INVESTOR COUNSEL, Encourages SES AI Corporation Investors to Secure Counsel Before Important Deadline in Securities Class Action First Filed by the Firm – SES
Halper Sadeh LLC is Investigating Whether OGN, XOMA, RMAX, SLNO are Obtaining Fair Deals for their Shareholders

active_items.action: 停止新增同类 AI/半导体/港股科技，优先复核重叠和单仓上限。

active_items.title: 黄金仓位低于保险仓下限
active_items.action: 复核是否需要把新增资金的一部分补回黄金保险仓；仍需看价格、溢价和组合整体仓位。

active_items.title: 黄金仓位高于保险仓上限
active_items.action: 提醒不要把黄金当收益主攻；如继续上冲，优先复核是否只保留保险仓功能。

active_items.title: 黄金期货单日大涨
active_items.action: 只做保险仓复核，不追高；看美元指数和美债收益率是否同步支持。

active_items.title: 黄金期货单日大跌
active_items.action: 先确认是否是美元/实际利率驱动；如黄金仓位低于目标区间，再考虑是否分批补保险仓。
